name: find_users
description: Find users in a slack workspace by any criteria - email, name, display name, or other text. includes optimized email lookup for exact email matches.

limit.description:
Maximum number of users to return (1 to 200). Defaults to 50.
Examples:
  10
  25
  100

exact_match.description:
Use exact matching instead of partial matching. Defaults to false.
Examples:
  true
  false

include_bots.description:
Include bot users in search results. Defaults to false.
Examples:
  true
  false

search_query.description:
Search query to find users. Searches across name, display name, real name, email address, first name, last name, and status text (case-insensitive partial matching). For exact email matches with exact_match=true, uses Slack's efficient email lookup endpoint.
Examples:
  "john"
  "john.doe@company.com"
  "john doe"
  "smith"
  "@company.com"

include_deleted.description:
Include deleted/deactivated users in search results. Defaults to false.
Examples:
  true
  false

include_restricted.description:
Include restricted (guest) users in search results. Defaults to true.
Examples:
  true
  false

arguments.description: Request schema for finding Slack users by any criteria (email, name, etc.).
